response.original_title: AE形 京成スカイライナー 成田空港～京成上野 往復
response.overview: High-speed advance! Experience the world of the fastest conventional train at 160 km/h, with the motor roaring!  Enjoy the Keisei Skyliner in 4K master and high-resolution audio.  　　The Keisei Electric Railway Skyliner is the only conventional railway line boasting a top speed of 160 km/h.  Designed by Kansai Yamamoto with the concepts of "wind" and "dignity," it is the second-generation train inheriting the traditional AE series design, serving as the fastest transport to Narita Airport.  This film captures the round trip from Narita Airport to Keisei Ueno in high-definition 4K and high-resolution 5.1ch surround sound.  Bonus features include a newly filmed introduction to the AE series Skyliner using a 4K camera, and a round trip front view of the Shibayama Railway Line, Japan's shortest railway.
response.title: Type AE Keisei Skyliner 4K Shooting Round-trip from Narita Airport to Keisei Ueno
